title: ORC Title 13, §1301.102 - Scope Of Chapter 1301 - Ucc 1-102
text:
Part 1. General Provisions
Sections 1301.101 to 1301.310 of the Revised Code apply to a transaction to the extent that it is governed by Chapter 1302., 1303., 1304., 1305., 1307., 1308., 1309., or 1310. of the Revised Code.
Added by 129th General AssemblyFile No.9, HB 9, Â§1, eff. 6/29/2011.
